alerts.headline: Winter Weather Advisory issued March 3 at 1:02PM EST until March 4 at 7:00AM EST by NWS Boston/Norton MA
alerts.description:
* WHAT...Mixed precipitation. Total snow accumulations up to two
inches and ice accumulations around one-tenth of an inch.

* WHERE...Portions of northern Connecticut, central, eastern,
northeastern, and western Massachusetts, and northern Rhode Island.

* WHEN...Until 7 AM EST Wednesday.

* IMPACTS...Power outages and tree damage are likely due to the ice.
Travel could be nearly impossible. The hazardous conditions could
impact the Tuesday evening and Wednesday morning commutes.

nws_forecast.name: This Afternoon
nws_forecast.detailed: Snow. Cloudy, with a high near 36. South wind around 5 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%. New snow accumulation of less than one inch possible.

nws_forecast.name: Tonight
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Rain And Snow then Light Rain
nws_forecast.detailed: Rain and snow before 7pm, then rain and a chance of freezing rain between 7pm and 10pm, then rain and patchy fog between 10pm and 3am, then patchy fog and a slight chance of rain. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 32. Southwest wind 2 to 7 mph. Chance of precipitation is 100%. New snow accumulation of less than half an inch possible.

nws_forecast.name: Wednesday
nws_forecast.detailed: Sunny, with a high near 43. West wind around 6 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Wednesday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Patchy fog after 7pm. Partly cloudy, with a low around 28. Southwest wind around 5 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Thursday
nws_forecast.detailed: Patchy fog before 7am, then a chance of rain. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 41. North wind around 7 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%.

nws_forecast.name: Thursday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Rain before 1am, then sleet and rain between 1am and 2am, then sleet and rain and snow. Cloudy, with a low around 34. Northeast wind 7 to 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%.

nws_forecast.name: Friday
nws_forecast.detailed: Sleet likely and rain likely before 7am, then sleet likely and rain and snow likely. Cloudy, with a high near 36. Northeast wind around 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%.

nws_forecast.name: Friday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: A slight chance of rain. Cloudy, with a low around 34. East wind 5 to 8 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Saturday
nws_forecast.detailed: A slight chance of rain. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 50. South wind 6 to 10 mph, with gusts as high as 21 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Saturday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Rain likely. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 43. Southwest wind around 12 mph, with gusts as high as 23 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%.

nws_forecast.name: Sunday
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Chance Light Rain then Mostly Sunny
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of rain before 11am. Mostly sunny, with a high near 54. West wind around 9 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%.

nws_forecast.name: Sunday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Partly cloudy, with a low around 39. Southwest wind around 8 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Monday
nws_forecast.detailed: A slight chance of rain between 7am and 2pm. Mostly sunny, with a high near 56. Southwest wind around 10 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Monday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Mostly clear, with a low around 40. West wind around 8 mph.
